_README: Per-vehicle briefing overrides for generate_pdf_report.py (kept in the skill, not vehicles.json, for self-containment). ARTIC GVM TIERS — domain knowledge for the load points: an articulated HGV's gross vehicle mass falls into tiers, lightest to heaviest — (1) TRACTOR-ONLY / bobtail ~10 t = the lightest cluster, NOT a real operating mass -> EXCLUDE it (set 'unladen_band_t' lo above it); (2) TRACTOR + EMPTY TRAILER ~16-19 t (rig-dependent) = UNLADEN; (3) LOADED operations = higher, operation-dependent, up to the rated GVW (~42 t) = LADEN. Set the band by AI JUDGEMENT of the observed GVM histogram/KDE, NOT by the default KDE split (which merges the unladen shoulder into the dominant laden peak and so mislabels a mostly-laden vehicle's unladen) nor by the legacy tertile (which lets the bobtail contaminate the lightest third). For such artics set 'unladen_band_t': [lo, hi] (and optionally 'laden_min_t'): unladen = data points in [lo, hi) (tractor + empty trailer), laden = GVM >= laden_min (default hi), bobtail (< lo) excluded. Omit to fall back to KDE light/heavy clustering. 'unladen_mass_t' can pin the unladen marker mass explicitly (use when the unladen cluster is sparse). 'note' records the judgement + provenance. Band takes priority over SINGLE_GROUP_REGS / LEGACY_TERTILE_REGS / KDE in _compute_load_points.

EX74JXW.note: Scania 23P, ARTIC, 42 t/518 kWh. All-data (n=240, KDE 12.7/24.6 t): bobtail ~12.7 t (10-13 t, 16 pts) EXCLUDED; UNLADEN sparse 13-19 t shoulder -> marker PINNED 17 t; LADEN >= 19 t (bulk 19-37 t, median ~25 t); full 42 t dashed projection. Tightened from window-data [14,20].

CMZ6260.note: Volvo FH Electric, ARTIC, ~42 t. All-data (n=327, KDE 10.5/19.6/23.8 t): bobtail ~10.5 t (12 pts) EXCLUDED; UNLADEN 14-18 t band (median ~16.4 t) PINNED 17 t; LADEN >= 18 t (median ~22 t); full 42 t projection. Default KDE merged the ~17 t unladen into the ~19.6 t laden peak (wrong unladen ~19 t); band corrects it.

YK73WFN.note: Volvo FH Electric, ARTIC, 42 t. All-data (n=838, KDE 11.1/19.4/27.8/39.2 t): bobtail ~11 t (10-12 t, **106 pts**) EXCLUDED — exactly why the legacy tertile mislabelled YK73; UNLADEN ~19 t (dominant 18-22 t cluster, this rig's empty); LADEN >= 24 t (~28 t and ~40 t clusters, median ~35 t); full 42 t. Switched from LEGACY_TERTILE to a band (changes the earlier Nestle-approved 1.16/1.79 baseline — at user request).

YN25RSY.note: Mercedes-Benz eActros 600, ARTIC, ~600 kWh. All-data (n=35, KDE 11.6/19.6/23.9 t): bobtail ~11.6 t (1 pt) EXCLUDED; UNLADEN ~19 t (17-21 t cluster; eActros empty is ~19 t); LADEN >= 21 t (median ~24 t); full 42 t projection. Switched from SINGLE_GROUP to a band (clear ~19 t unladen cluster).

AV24LXJ.note: Volvo (volvo_speed_00 trio), ARTIC. All-data (n=5725, KDE 16.9/40.0 t): BIMODAL — bobtail ~10-12 t (~106 pts) EXCLUDED; UNLADEN ~16 t = the large 15-19 t cluster (~2400 pts); LADEN >= 19 t (runs mostly near-full, heavy cluster ~37-41 t, median ~38 t); full 42 t. Band excludes the bobtail and isolates the ~16 t empty from the ~40 t laden.

AV24LXK.note: Volvo (volvo_speed_00 trio), ARTIC. All-data (n=5558, KDE 16.7/39.7 t): BIMODAL like AV24LXJ — bobtail ~10-12 t EXCLUDED; UNLADEN ~16 t (15-19 t cluster, ~2600 pts); LADEN >= 19 t (heavy ~40 t, median ~39 t); full 42 t.

AV24LXL.note: Volvo (volvo_speed_00 trio), ARTIC. All-data (n=5315, KDE 17.1/40.3 t): BIMODAL — bobtail ~10-12 t EXCLUDED; UNLADEN ~17 t (15-19 t cluster, ~2400 pts); LADEN >= 19 t (heavy ~40 t, median ~39 t); full 42 t.

EV73SAL.note: Volvo FH Electric, ARTIC. All-data (n=1198, KDE 11.4/19.5/28.0/40.2 t): bobtail ~11 t (10-14 t, ~186 pts, 15%!) EXCLUDED; UNLADEN ~19 t (18-20 t cluster); LADEN >= 24 t (clusters ~28 t and ~40 t, median ~30 t); full 42 t. Like YK73.

EX74JXY.note: Scania (scania_speed_01), ARTIC. All-data (n=364, KDE 21.1/26.5/51.5 t): bobtail ~12 t (9-15 t, ~42 pts) EXCLUDED; UNLADEN ~19 t (17-21 t cluster); LADEN >= 21 t (~25 t, median ~26 t); full 42 t. The 51 t point is a single outlier (ignored by the trend).

KY24LHT.note: Volvo (volvo_speed_03), ARTIC. All-data (n=437, KDE 10.3/24.1 t): bobtail ~10 t (9-11 t, 55 pts, 13%!) EXCLUDED; UNLADEN ~17 t (15-19 t); LADEN >= 19 t (broad 19-29 t, median ~24 t); full 42 t (observed tops ~33 t -> dashed projection). Broad laden cluster. NOTE: KY24LHT is excluded from the statistics paper (EXCLUDE_REGS) but still gets a briefing.

N88GNW.note: Renault (renault_speed), ARTIC. All-data (n=1380, KDE 11.2/18.3 t): bobtail ~11 t (10-14 t, ~36 pts) EXCLUDED; UNLADEN ~18 t (16-20 t cluster, ~726 pts); LADEN >= 21 t (decreasing tail 22-40 t, median ~26 t); full 42 t.

TA70WTL.note: Renault (renault_speed), ARTIC. All-data (n=795, KDE 18.6 t): bobtail ~11 t (10-14 t, ~22 pts) EXCLUDED; UNLADEN ~18 t (16-20 t cluster, ~404 pts); LADEN >= 21 t (tail 22-44 t, median ~26 t); full 42 t. Like N88GNW (same pipeline).
